unadjusted/unw.notes: absorbed FE blocks use the aux-regression (gamma0) variance. declared absorbed-target coefficients in the full model are imposed at zero, not estimated. WARNING: absorbed-target inference is not certified for this VCE. Use vce(cluster) with clusters equal to an FE dimension that absorbs every declared target; unadjusted, robust, or crossed clustering can be anti-conservative.
